test-case.description: Throws when manifest path does not exist
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Path validation.Throws when manifest path does not exist

test-case.description: Throws when public source directory does not exist
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Path validation.Throws when public source directory does not exist

test-suite.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Manifest and source are in sync
test-suite.description: Test-ManifestCompliance.Manifest and source are in sync

test-case.description: Passes when FunctionsToExport matches discovered functions
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Manifest and source are in sync.Passes when FunctionsToExport matches discovered functions

test-suite.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function defined in source but missing from manifest
test-suite.description: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function defined in source but missing from manifest

test-case.description: Throws when a function is defined but not exported
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function defined in source but missing from manifest.Throws when a function is defined but not exported

test-suite.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function in manifest but not in source (stale export)
test-suite.description: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function in manifest but not in source (stale export)

test-case.description: Throws when a function is exported but not defined in source
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Function in manifest but not in source (stale export).Throws when a function is exported but not defined in source

test-suite.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Functions in nested .psm1 files are discovered
test-suite.description: Test-ManifestCompliance.Functions in nested .psm1 files are discovered

test-case.description: Passes when functions in nested .psm1 files match the manifest
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Functions in nested .psm1 files are discovered.Passes when functions in nested .psm1 files match the manifest

test-suite.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Empty manifest with empty source passes
test-suite.description: Test-ManifestCompliance.Empty manifest with empty source passes

test-case.description: Passes with no exported functions and no source functions
test-case.name: Test-ManifestCompliance.Empty manifest with empty source passes.Passes with no exported functions and no source functions
